Trademark

How the Mull name and marks may be used.

The name

"Mull" and the Mull logo are names and marks associated with this project. The software is open source, but the name and marks are not granted under the code license.

Allowed use

You may refer to the project by name when discussing, reviewing, or linking to it. Accurate, non-confusing references — such as "built with Mull" or "a fork of Mull" — are welcome.

Please avoid

  • Using the Mull name or logo to imply official affiliation or endorsement
  • Publishing modified builds under the Mull name without clarification that they are unofficial
  • Registering the Mull name or a confusingly similar mark for your own goods or services

Logos

The Mull mark in this site's favicon is provided for reference in community and educational contexts. For any commercial or promotional use, reach out first.

Uncertain about a use? Ask us.
